auth.welcomeSubtitle: Sign in to start building with AI SaaS
auth.termsAgreement: By continuing, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
auth.enterPasswordDesc: Enter your password to sign in.
auth.magicLinkDesc: We'll send you a magic link to sign in instantly.
auth.magicLinkSent: We sent a magic link to <bold>{email}</bold>
auth.accountDeletedDesc: Your account has been deleted as requested. If you wish to use our service again, please create a new account.
auth.signUpDisabledDesc: New user registration is temporarily disabled. If you already have an account, please sign in with the same email.
auth.accountSuspendedDesc: Your account has been suspended due to a violation of our terms of service. If you believe this is a mistake, please contact our support team.

billing.purchaseCreditsDesc: Purchase credits or upgrade your subscription

payment.contactSupport: Contact support if the problem persists.

aiChat.errorNetwork: Network error, please check your connection
aiChat.errorTimeout: Request timeout, please try again later
aiChat.errorUnauthorized: Session expired, please refresh to sign in again
aiChat.errorRateLimit: Too many requests, please try again later
aiChat.errorServer: Server error, please try again later
aiChat.errorToolSchema: This agent does not support the tool. Please switch agent.
aiChat.errorModel: Model configuration error, please contact admin
aiChat.errorDefault: An error occurred, please try again

errors.notFoundDesc: The page you are looking for does not exist.
errors.serverErrorDesc: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
errors.unauthorizedDesc: You need to be signed in to access this page.
errors.forbiddenDesc: You do not have permission to access this resource.

hero.subtitle: A production-ready AI SaaS framework with auth, billing, payments, and AI chat built in.
hero.subtitleAccent: Focus on your core feature. We handle the rest.

account.deleteAccountConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.
